2604.07296.title: OpenSpatial: A Principled Data Engine for Empowering Spatial Intelligence
2604.07296.paper_summary: Spatial understanding is a fundamental cornerstone of human-level intelligence. Nonetheless, current research predominantly focuses on domain-specific data production, leaving a critical void: the absence of a principled, open-source engine capable of fully unleashing the potential of high-quality spatial data. To bridge this gap, we elucidate the design principles of a robust data generation system and introduce OpenSpatial -- an open-source data engine engineered for high quality, extensive scalability, broad task diversity, and optimized efficiency. OpenSpatial adopts 3D bounding boxes as the fundamental primitive to construct a comprehensive data hierarchy across five foundational tasks: Spatial Measurement (SM), Spatial Relationship (SR), Camera Perception (CP), Multi-view Consistency (MC), and Scene-Aware Reasoning (SAR). Leveraging this scalable infrastructure, we curate OpenSpatial-3M, a large-scale dataset comprising 3 million high-fidelity samples. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that versatile models trained on our dataset achieve state-of-the-art performance across a wide spectrum of spatial reasoning benchmarks. Notably, the best-performing model exhibits a substantial average improvement of 19 percent, relatively. Furthermore, we provide a systematic analysis of how data attributes influence spatial perception. By open-sourcing both the engine and the 3M-scale dataset, we provide a robust foundation to accelerate future research in spatial intelligence.
2604.07296.paper_summary_zh: 空間理解是人類智慧的基本基石。儘管如此，目前的研究主要集中在特定領域的數據生成上，留下了一個關鍵的空白：缺乏一個原則性、開源的引擎，能夠充分釋放高質量空間數據的潛力。為了填補這一空白，我們闡明了一個穩健的數據生成系統的設計原則，並介紹了OpenSpatial——一個為高質量、廣泛可擴展性、廣泛任務多樣性和優化效率而設計的開源數據引擎。OpenSpatial採用3D邊界框作為基本原始元素，構建涵蓋五個基礎任務的綜合數據層級：空間測量（SM）、空間關係（SR）、相機感知（CP）、多視角一致性（MC）和場景感知推理（SAR）。利用這一可擴展的基礎設施，我們策劃了OpenSpatial-3M，一個包含300萬個高保真樣本的大型數據集。廣泛的評估顯示，在我們的數據集上訓練的多功能模型在各種空間推理基準上達到了最先進的性能。值得注意的是，表現最佳的模型顯示出相對平均提升19%的顯著改善。此外，我們提供了系統分析，探討數據屬性如何影響空間感知。通過開源引擎和3M規模數據集，我們為加速未來的空間智慧研究提供了堅實的基礎。
2604.07296.author: Jianhui Liu et.al.
2604.07296.authors: Jianhui Liu, Haoze Sun, Wenbo Li, Yanbing Zhang, Rui Yang, Zhiliang Zhu, Yijun Yang, Shenghe Zheng, Nan Jiang, Jiaxiu Jiang, Haoyang Huang, Tien-Tsin Wong, Nan Duan, Xiaojuan Qi
